subject: feat(pwa): strengthen hooks — concurrent guard, pattern alignment, full browser coverage
body:
usePWAUpdate:
- Add _isChecking module-level guard to checkForUpdate() preventing
  concurrent calls from overlapping (double-tap protection).

usePWAInstall — full alignment with glow-props PWA_SYSTEM.md pattern:
- Expand browser detection from 5 to 9 types (add Opera, Samsung
  Internet, Vivaldi, Arc). Samsung/Opera ordered before Chrome in UA
  checks since their UA strings contain both identifiers.
- Export CHROMIUM_BROWSERS constant as single source of truth.
- Add BROWSER_DISPLAY_NAMES map for UI rendering.
- Brave detection uses 'brave' in navigator (UA stripped on mobile).
- Display-mode change listener catches browser-menu installs where
  appinstalled event doesn't fire.
- 5-second diagnostic timeout on Chromium: logs warning with manifest/SW
  status, falls back to manual instructions (Chrome suppresses prompt
  for 90 days after user dismissal).
- trackInstallEvent() localStorage analytics (prompted/installed/
  dismissed/installed-via-browser), capped at 50 entries.
- install() wrapped in try/catch — Chrome throws DOMException if
  prompt() is called twice on the same event.
- iOS non-Safari cross-redirect in getInstallInstructions() — tells
  users to open in Safari with explanation why.
- Install instructions for Samsung Internet and Opera.
- Vivaldi/Arc fall through to generic Chromium instructions.
- Effect deps corrected to include supportsAutoInstall and browser.

Tags: pwa, hooks, browser-detection, analytics, error-handling
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: minor
